summary: Instrumented real run to capture ground-truth execution data for a 1:1 reproduction of dynamic workflows.

fanout.note: waits for all parallel branches to finish
Formats result into required data structure

pipeline: Received stage-1 id=0, primitive="pipeline:stage-semantics" for originalItem="stage-semantics".
Received stage-1 id=1 for originalItem="no-barrier" with primitive="pipeline:no-barrier".
result.synthesis: Two fanout primitives were exercised (parallel-barrier and concurrency-cap), plus schema-output for result formatting, while the pipeline exercised pipeline:stage-semantics and pipeline:no-barrier across two stages. The parallel fanout preserved input order, as evidenced by the items retaining their original id sequence (0, 1, 2). The pipeline also maintained order, with stage-1 results indexed consistently with their original items.
